infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: RoadCopilot uses motion sensors on this phone to notice firmer slowdowns, quicker accelerations, and sharper turns during a trip — only to build a calm, on-device summary for family. It does not control the vehicle.

plugins.cameraPermission: RoadCopilot uses the camera to read lane position on the road ahead and help you stay comfortably centered. Video is not uploaded unless you choose to share it later.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: RoadCopilot uses your location to plan driving routes starting from where you are.
